chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1849 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of CMA No.5149/2019 17.09.2019 Petitioner Majid Ahmed, present in person. Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Ali Raza Pathan, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application for return of passport. It appears that interim pre-arrest bail was granted to the petitioner by this Court vide order dated 26.09.2017 and the petitioner was directed to deposit his passport with the Additional Registrar of this Court. Subsequently, interim pre-arrest bail granted to the petitioner was confirmed on same terms and conditions vide order dated 21.12.2017. Special Prosecutor NAB pointed out that petitioner has entered into plea bargain, which has been accepted by the trial Court vide order dated 03.05.2018, which is placed on record. He further submitted that passport of the petitioner is no more required. Report has been submitted by the Accountant of this Court and perusal of the same reveals that the passport of the petitioner is still lying with the Accountant. In the view of above, office is directed to return the passport to the petitioner after proper identification and verification as per rules. The listed application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
